/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/link.d  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,libeckit_mpi.so -o ../../../lib/libeckit_mpi.so CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/Comm.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/DataType.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/Operation.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/Request.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/Group.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/Serial.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/SerialStatus.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/SerialRequest.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_mpi.dir/Status.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
